rationale:
Single-file HTML content reorganization of `cjb-workflow-health.html`. The chapter title gains the prefix 'Reimagining Mailchimp Automation Flows:', the three `

` pillar names are rewritten to 'Pillar 1: Make Every Automation Flow Work, Every Time', 'Pillar 2: Trigger Flows on What Customers Actually Do', and 'Pillar 3: Let AI Build the Flow, Optimize the Send, and Pick the Channel'. Deliverability + Compliance rows (the 'Compliance transparency + policy SLAs' and 'Inbox placement + deliverability tooling' `` blocks) are removed from Pillar 3 and inserted into Pillar 1 under a new subtheme row. Pillar 1 gains a new 'Automation Reporting & Analytics' subtheme block with five new initiatives (reporting fix, per-step KPIs, aggregate reporting, sharing/export, per-flow send timing). Pillar 2 adds the 'Reinstate basic CJB on Free plan' (1.4.1) row under a new 'Free-Tier Activation' subtheme. Pillar 3 adds 'Cross-channel orchestration + AI anti-fatigue' under the AI-Guided Omni-Channel subtheme. A new `

Addressed via Reimagining the Unified Builder

` table appears at the bottom with four cross-referenced initiatives. Pure HTML strategy-doc edit; no code, no tests, no cheat surface.
